core.label: Raku Fundamentals
core.description: Perl's sister language with grammars, concurrency, and gradual typing.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Rakudo (the Raku compiler). Raku was formerly known as Perl 6.

topics.label: Variables & Sigils
topics.description: $ scalar, @ array, % hash. Twigils for scope: $. $! $* $?.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elsif/else, given/when (switch), for, while, loop. Junctions for parallel checks.

topics.label: Subroutines & Signatures
topics.description: sub with typed parameters, multi dispatch, and optional/named parameters.

topics.label: Classes & OOP
topics.description: class with has attributes, method, does for roles (mixins).

topics.label: Regexes & Grammars
topics.description: Raku regexes are readable. grammar/token/rule for parsing. Raku's killer feature.

topics.label: Concurrency
topics.description: Promises, Channels, Supplies for reactive async programming.

topics.label: Gradual Typing
topics.description: Optional type annotations with subset types and where clauses.
